title: [EPIC] Detail Navigation and Browse Wiring
description: Stabilize the ownership contract between navigator routes, search results, and detail panes so artist and playlist pages receive the right data without breaking QueueStore or queue authority boundaries.

title: Improve edit mode UX in search and navigation
description: Make edit mode clearer and safer so users understand when they are editing, navigating, or confirming actions.

title: Epic: UI/UX Excellence for Tier 1 Flows
[EPIC] YtDlp extractor PO-token refactor
description: Refactor the monolithic YtDlpExtractor while preserving the Extractor contract and existing decorator graph (UrlResolver -> CachedExtractor -> FallbackExtractor<YtxExtractor, YtDlpExtractor>). Internal changes only: split policy/arg-building/provider management concerns, resolve JS runtime via env override -> which bun -> which node, compose provider URL from host+port, keep lazy provider startup, and degrade once to format 251 with cookies intact when provider bootstrap fails. Defer daemon->UI warning protocol and any new daemon CLI/config plumbing.

title: Extract yt-dlp policy and command builder helpers
description: Batch A. Split pure decision/building logic out of YtDlpExtractor without changing the public Extractor contract. Introduce private helper types for ProviderEndpoint (host+port with base_url()), YtDlpPolicy (HQ plan vs degraded 251 plan), and YtDlpCommandBuilder (formats, cookies, js runtime, repeated extractor args). Files: rmpc/src/backends/youtube/extractor/ytdlp.rs and/or private helper modules beside it, plus focused tests. TDD: base_url composition, plan selection, HQ arg construction, and degraded-251 arg construction are covered by unit tests.

title: Replace BgutilServer with provider manager and runtime resolver
description: Batch B. Replace the current BgutilServer shape with a provider manager that owns lazy startup, reachability checks, script lookup, child lifecycle, and runtime resolution. Runtime lookup order must be env override -> which bun -> which node. Provider URL must be composed from host+port instead of a duplicated base URL constant. Files: rmpc/src/backends/youtube/extractor/ytdlp.rs and related tests. TDD: runtime resolution order and provider endpoint composition are verified through unit seams; existing reachable provider is reused before spawning.

title: Warn and retry once with format 251 on provider bootstrap failure
description: Batch C. Keep YtDlpExtractor as the orchestration shell: choose HQ+PO-token attempt first, ensure provider only when needed, warn through a log-first diagnostics seam when provider bootstrap fails, then retry exactly once with cookies intact and -f 251. Do not change Extractor, CachedExtractor, FallbackExtractor, YtxExtractor, or UrlResolver contracts. Files: rmpc/src/backends/youtube/extractor/ytdlp.rs and focused tests. TDD: bootstrap failure no longer returns immediate batch-wide terminal errors; it emits a warning path and retries with 251.

title: Validate refactor and update PO-token docs if behavior changed
description: Batch D. Run focused diagnostics and nextest coverage for the refactor, and update po-token.md only if the documented manual flow or operator-facing behavior changed. Verify the public extractor graph still composes the same way and that the new internal behavior is reflected by tests rather than daemon CLI flags. Files: po-token.md if needed, rmpc/src/backends/youtube/extractor/ytdlp.rs tests, and any touched docs. Verification: lsp diagnostics clean and targeted nextest passes for new/existing yt-dlp extractor tests.

title: [EPIC] Unified Streaming Audio File Architecture
Clean ytmapi warning noise after parser overhaul
description: Remove or narrow warning sources in ytmapi parser code so normal verification runs stay readable.

title: [EPIC] Unified Streaming Improvements
Centralize navigator redraw scheduling for consumed handled keys
description: NavigatorPane local movement keys can mutate in-pane view state and consume the key without producing an immediate redraw. Centralize the synchronous redraw contract in Navigator so any consumed PaneAction::Handled schedules RequestRender, document the contract, and cover it with regression tests for detail/library panes and non-consumed handled keys.
close_reason: Implemented navigator-owned redraw contract and regression tests in working tree

title: [EPIC] Search Result Polish
description: Improve search UX and metadata fidelity: autocomplete visibility/debounce, rich top-result rendering, and better edit mode without changing backend search ownership.

title: Add near-term prebuffer tier for upcoming tracks
description: Add an explicit prebuffer window for soon-to-play tracks so cache warming is not limited to immediate fallback or broad background prefetch.

title: Stabilize queue modal against stale local queue state
description: Queue modal navigation and actions still read directly from local QueueStore snapshots while queue authority is split across QueueStore, app_state, and backend status. Symptoms include 'song not found', stale queue rows, and queue content not matching current playback state. Investigate a single queue authority contract for modal/tab rendering and navigation, then route queue selection/actions through that contract instead of fragile local indices.

title: Fix repeat-one and single-track auto-advance semantics
description: Make repeat-one and single-track queue behavior deterministic across normal EOF, early-EOF recovery, and manual navigation while keeping the daemon queue authoritative.

title: Reduce URL extraction TTL and tighten invalidation policy
description: Shorten stale stream URL lifetime, align invalidation with real playback failures, and verify eviction behavior so expired YouTube URLs are not reused for too long.

title: Investigate cached extractor prefetch timing test instability
description: cargo nextest run in rmpc currently fails backends::youtube::extractor::cached::tests::test_extract_one_does_not_wait_for_prefetch. Recent rmpc commits did not touch extractor code, so first determine whether this is a pre-existing flaky timing threshold or an indirect regression before changing behavior.

title: Define detail navigation contract for artist and playlist pages
description: Fix the ownership boundary between SearchPaneV2 local content stacks and Navigator-owned detail panes so artist and playlist detail views receive the correct data consistently.
close_reason: Implemented navigator-owned detail navigation contract in working tree

comments.author: assistant
comments.text: Implemented navigator-owned detail navigation contract in working tree. Navigator now owns async detail fetch orchestration, shows a loading placeholder during pending detail navigation, ignores stale detail responses after cancel/back, and routes accepted detail payloads into navigator-owned detail panes instead of SearchPaneV2 local stacks. Main files: rmpc/src/ui/panes/navigator.rs, rmpc/src/ui/mod.rs.

title: TopResult parsing incorrectly uses duration as artist name
description:
**Problem**: In search TopResults, duration text is sometimes parsed as the artist name, causing incorrect display.

**Affected Files**:
- `rmpc/src/backends/youtube/adapter.rs` (lines 229, 239, 253, 265 - subtitle uses r.artist)
- `rmpc/src/backends/youtube/api.rs` (lines 475-476 - r.artist insertion)
- Possibly upstream in `ytmapi-yrmpc/src/parse/search.rs` (TopResult parsing)

**Investigation Needed**:
1. Check if ytmapi-rs TopResult struct has incorrect field mapping
2. Verify if YouTube API changed response format for TopResult
3. Add test cases with captured JSON to reproduce

**User-visible Impact**: Artist name shows as duration (e.g., '3:45' instead of actual artist name)
close_reason: Fixed via normalized ytmapi search parsing in b19a6fd

title: [EPIC] Queue Pane UI Polish
description: Improve queue pane artwork, placeholder behavior, loading states, wrong-image cases, and overall layout without changing queue authority or data ownership.

title: [EPIC] Queue Consistency and Playback Modes
description: Make the daemon-owned logical queue authoritative, preserve QueueStore optimization, and fix repeat-one/single/shuffle/one-item queue behavior without mixing transport work into the audio-delivery epic.

title: Implement playlist detail wiring on top of navigation contract
description: Use the shared detail navigation contract to make playlist pages consistently populate from search and navigation flows.
close_reason: Implemented playlist detail wiring on navigator-owned detail panes

comments.author: assistant
comments.text: Playlist detail wiring now works through the shared navigator contract. Playlist detail data is routed into the navigator-owned playlist pane, and manual testing confirmed playlist navigation is responsive after the redraw contract fix. Main files: rmpc/src/ui/panes/navigator.rs, rmpc/src/ui/mod.rs.

title: Add debounce and backpressure to autocomplete requests
description: Stop firing autocomplete/network requests on every keystroke and add a controlled debounce/backpressure policy.

title: [EPIC] Audio Delivery Architecture Refactor (Direct/Combined/Relay)
[EPIC] No Stutter Playback Execution
description: Execute .sisyphus/plans/no-stutter-playback.md inside the audio-delivery epic: authoritative transport-neutral prep core, diagnostics baseline, transport selection, relay contract boundary, cancellation/backpressure, and end-to-end no-stutter verification.
notes: No-stutter playback epic implementation is complete. Shared preparation core, authoritative Combined runtime path, Relay contract boundary, verification matrix, and EOF completion-gate evidence are all done. Final supervisor verification: focused EOF runtime test passed, cargo nextest run summary 2001 passed / 30 skipped, cargo check passed.

title: T1 Build baseline transport diagnostics harness
description: Add structured diagnostics, deterministic repro harness, and characterization tests for transport choice, tier, fallback reason, prefix cache result, and EOF recovery.

title: T10 Build end-to-end no-stutter verification matrix
description: Add targeted integration/runtime verification for Direct, Combined, and Relay-contract behavior covering TTFA, fallback, EOF recovery, URL expiry, cancellation, and transition stability.
notes: EOF completion gate closed with deterministic MPV runtime repro/evidence. Added truncated fixture harness in rmpc/tests/playback_integration.rs, refreshed .sisyphus/evidence/task-10-eof-regression.log with emitted [DIAG-EOF] lines and explicit cause, reran focused ignored playback_integration EOF test successfully, and reran full cargo nextest gate (2001 passed, 30 skipped) plus cargo check.

title: F1 Plan compliance audit
description: Verify the final implementation preserves the shared-core/adapter boundary and respects every must-have and guardrail from the no-stutter plan.
notes: Audit completed. Shared-core boundary, Direct fallback, bounded stale work, and scope guardrails passed. Final plan-compliance closure is blocked only by T10 EOF artifact-backed evidence.

title: F2 Runtime diagnostics review
description: Execute the diagnostics harness and confirm fallback reasons, transport choices, and EOF/recovery evidence are present and consistent.
notes: Runtime diagnostics review completed with conditional pass. Structured diagnostics exist, but final artifact-backed runtime EOF evidence is still being refreshed under T10.

title: F3 Scope fidelity check
description: Confirm no queue/UI/search work leaked into the no-stutter playback effort.
notes: Scope fidelity review completed and passed; no queue/UI/search scope creep detected.

title: F4 Direct fallback regression review
description: Confirm Direct still works as explicit hotfix mode and automatic Immediate-tier fallback after Combined transport changes land.
notes: Direct fallback regression review completed and passed; explicit Direct mode and automatic fallback remain intact.

title: T2 Introduce transport-neutral prepared media contract
description: Replace legacy transport-shaped result vocabulary with a shared prepared-media handoff that Combined and Relay can both consume without reopening mode decisions downstream.

title: T3 Complete Direct/Combined naming cleanup
description: Rename remaining internal Passthrough/Concat names to Direct/Combined while preserving backward-compatible config aliases.

title: T4 Route all playback onto one authoritative preparation pipeline
description: Unify sync and async play paths so immediate playback and prefetch-driven playback use the same planner and preparer contract.

title: T5 Move staging fully into the shared preparation core
description: Remove prefix staging/download responsibility from the Combined adapter so transport adapters consume prepared artifacts only.

title: T6 Add cancellation and backpressure for stale preparation work
description: Bound or cancel obsolete immediate/gapless/background work so latest-play intent wins and stale jobs stop consuming network/cache resources.

title: T7 Run Combined transport spike and select the safest transport
description: Compare concat URL with ffconcat file, mpv edl, and other minimal alternatives; capture TTFA, reconnect propagation, and failure evidence before selecting the Combined baseline.

title: T8 Define Relay transport contract and session model
description: Define how Relay exposes staged prefix plus upstream stream as one localhost transport, including session lifecycle, range handling, and reconnect ownership, without full rollout.

title: T9 Implement the selected Combined transport adapter
description: Apply the winning Combined transport from the spike while preserving Direct fallback and consuming shared-core prepared artifacts only.

title: [EPIC] Immediate Relay Path Cleanup Execution
description: Execute ADR-004 immediate relay path cleanup: single coordinator ownership, relay-first immediate play, live tee-miss path, background next-3 coordination, and thin-executor cleanup for stream_upstream_segment. Source artifacts: docs/adr/ADR-004-immediate-relay-path-cleanup-2026-03-24.md and .sisyphus/plans/2026-03-24-immediate-relay-cleanup-implementation.md.

title: Split immediate play from future-track preparation
description: Batch B. Make immediate play prepare only the current track and delay next-3 scheduling until playback actually starts sending bytes. Files: rmpc/src/backends/youtube/server/orchestrator.rs, rmpc/src/backends/youtube/server/playback_prepare.rs, rmpc/src/backends/youtube/services/playback_service.rs, rmpc/tests/youtube_playback_coordinator_tests.rs. TDD: immediate path no longer synchronously prepares next 3 tracks.

title: Queue extraction vs prefix ownership cleanup
description: Batch C. Keep broad queue extraction but prevent current-track conflicts. Files: rmpc/src/backends/youtube/server/handlers/queue_events.rs, rmpc/src/backends/youtube/server/orchestrator.rs, rmpc/tests/youtube_playback_coordinator_tests.rs. TDD: batch extract keeps running for non-current tracks, immediate-target batch result gets dropped if stale, queue change lets active prefix job finish then recomputes window.

title: Make StreamAndCache live for immediate cache miss
description: Batch D. Immediate cache miss should stream upstream now and tee only prefix bytes into cache. Files: rmpc/src/backends/youtube/media/preparer.rs, rmpc/src/backends/youtube/media/mod.rs, rmpc/src/backends/youtube/media/relay.rs plus tests. TDD: immediate cache miss emits PrepareResult::StreamAndCache, cache hit stays StagedPrefix, direct remains fallback-only.

title: Introduce relay planner and upstream plan types
description: Batch E. Add RelayPlayStrategy and UpstreamReadPlan, moving strategy selection out of transport execution. Files: rmpc/src/backends/youtube/media/relay_planner.rs, rmpc/src/backends/youtube/media/upstream_plan.rs, rmpc/src/backends/youtube/media/relay_runtime.rs, rmpc/tests/youtube_relay_strategy_tests.rs. TDD: cache-hit => CacheHitRelay, miss => TeeMissRelay, direct only after whole strategy failure.

title: Turn stream_upstream_segment into a thin executor
description: Batch F. Clean up stream_upstream_segment so it only executes a chosen UpstreamReadPlan and no longer owns product-level fallback selection. Files: rmpc/src/backends/youtube/media/relay_runtime.rs, rmpc/src/backends/youtube/media/upstream_plan.rs plus relay runtime tests.

title: Make relay-to-direct fallback an explicit owner transition
description: Batch G. When relay strategy fails as a whole, swap owner on the same current track to direct fallback while keeping next-3 work alive. Files: rmpc/src/backends/youtube/server/orchestrator.rs, rmpc/src/backends/youtube/services/playback_service.rs, coordinator tests. TDD: no early direct fallback on first internal retry, direct fallback does not keep caching current track.

title: Docs and end-to-end verification for ADR-004
description: Batch H. Update discoverability and verify all user-approved rules. Files: docs/INDEX.md, docs/arch/playback-flow.md and/or docs/arch/playback-engine.md if needed, focused runtime/logic tests. Verify immediate cache hit, tee-miss, queue add idle/playing, stale batch extract drop, and relay strategy failure to direct fallback.

title: Coordinator snapshot and resolved horizon model
description: Batch A. Introduce PlaybackCoordinator snapshot and PlaybackHorizon resolver before behavior changes. Files: rmpc/src/backends/youtube/server/playback_coordinator.rs, rmpc/src/backends/youtube/server/playback_horizon.rs, rmpc/tests/youtube_playback_coordinator_tests.rs. TDD: current track excluded from next-3, next-3 derived from resolved playback horizon, queue change while prefixing does not mutate active job immediately.

title: Restore navigator-mode autocomplete result wiring
description: Navigator-mode SearchPaneV2 requested suggestions but ignored SearchSuggestions query results, so the autocomplete dropdown never populated under the active navigator architecture. Fix by routing SearchSuggestions through NavigatorPane::on_query_finished and sharing the same suggestion application logic used by the legacy path.
close_reason: Implemented navigator-mode autocomplete wiring in working tree

title: [EPIC] Runtime Overhead Cleanup for Playback Start and Relay
description: Reduce runtime overhead and wasted CPU in the playback-start/coordinator/relay path. Replace continuous control-plane signals with edge-triggered lifecycle events, coalesce prefix-worker scheduling, remove relay busy-polling, and eliminate redundant horizon/warm work while preserving ADR-004 behavior.

title: Replace TimeRemaining control-plane path with one-shot PlaybackStarted
description: Replace raw TimeRemaining control-plane flow with a one-shot PlaybackStarted lifecycle event emitted once per track/generation from the MPV boundary. Remove noisy forwarding/logging and keep only the minimal start signal needed for coordinator startup.

title: Coalesce prefix worker kicks and dedupe playback window activation
description: Make prefix-window scheduling edge-triggered and coalesced. Ensure redundant kicks collapse into one pending wakeup, avoid re-activating identical playback windows, and reduce unnecessary background prepare churn in orchestrator/queue/track-ended flows.

title: Remove relay runtime busy-polling accept loop
description: Replace relay runtime sleep-based nonblocking accept polling with a lower-overhead blocking or timeout-based listener loop so relay mode does not wake continuously when idle.

title: Reduce duplicate horizon and warm work, verify current-track lifecycle
description: Eliminate duplicate queue warm/horizon work, ensure coordinator current-track lifecycle stays correct across auto-advance and queue mutations, and avoid redundant full-horizon work where possible without breaking playback semantics.

title: Verify runtime-overhead cleanup and update docs
description: Run focused validation for playback-start, prefix worker, relay runtime, queue lifecycle, and resource-usage behavior; update docs if behavior or architecture wording changed.

title: Verify byte-perfect EOF boundaries and transition correctness
description: Validate that playback transitions happen at the real media boundary, distinguish true EOF from transport dropouts, and document the remaining edge cases after early-EOF recovery.

title: Preserve metadata and rich rendering for top search result
description: Keep structured metadata for the top search result and render it as a richer component instead of flattening it into generic rows.

title: 1-item queue repeats after EOF despite RepeatMode::Off
Stabilize ytmapi live tests against current endpoint behavior
description: Keep relevant live coverage green by fixing parser drift and explicitly skipping stale OAuth or obsolete endpoint cases with reasons.

title: Support Netscape cookie jars in ytmapi browser auth
description: Teach ytmapi browser auth to read Netscape cookie-jar files from disk instead of assuming a raw Cookie header string.

title: [EPIC] Fix relay cache reuse, repeat ownership leak, and eager ytdlp provider startup
close_reason: User verified the relay/prefix/repeat/current-track fixes, regression tests passed, and docs were updated.

comments.author: assistant
comments.text:
Implementation map for release/tag 0.1:

Submodule commit 36ea1c0e57e19277a0f7bcbb896a3887f6d5cba3 (rmpc)
- Relay/media pipeline: audio cache + planner + concat sources + cached extractor + yt-dlp integration + preparer + relay runtime/planner + staging pipeline + upstream plan + URL resolver
- Server architecture split: new playback_coordinator, playback_horizon, playback_prepare, prefetch_manager, queue_coordinator, queue_view, track_ended, test_support
- Handler/orchestrator refactor: play_intent, playback, queue, queue_events, status, server mod, orchestrator
- Runtime fixes covered: tee-prefix promotion, original URL reuse after prefix download, eager ytdlp/bgutil bootstrap, delta queue reconciliation, stop/clear coordinator reset, current-track fencing, stale TrackChanged ignore for relay/direct fallback, queue horizon preservation during in-flight immediate play
- Regression coverage: tests/playback_integration.rs, tests/youtube_playback_coordinator_tests.rs, tests/youtube_relay_strategy_tests.rs, plus focused unit tests in preparer/orchestrator/playback_coordinator/playback_horizon/queue_events/shared play_queue

Root commit 9910bb3c0ed2c124b520ad33c8619b1e84a9febe
- Docs sync: docs/INDEX.md, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/arch/playback-flow.md, docs/backends/youtube/README.md, docs/adr/ADR-004-immediate-relay-path-cleanup-2026-03-24.md
- Beads sync: .beads/approach.md, discovery.md, decisions.md, execution-plan.md, issues.jsonl, .gitignore
- Canonical runtime contract documented: PlaybackCoordinator owns in-flight current track during immediate startup; PlayQueue.current_id is advisory until playback starts; stale TrackChanged(-1) must not restore previous song; immediate cache miss usually streams via StreamAndCache; direct URL is fallback only if relay setup fails

If we later rewrite commit messages, use this comment as the authoritative scope map.

title: Fix current-track reprepare leak after append+repeat
description: Add regression coverage for append+repeat. Ensure current track does not re-enter background/prefix preparation while valid repeat-all wrap behavior remains intact.

title: Promote tee-completed prefixes into reusable audio cache hits
description: After successful tee completion, promote/register the written prefix so replay uses staged/cache-hit behavior instead of tee-miss again. Guard against partial prefix registration.

title: Eager-start bgutil provider when extractor is ytdlp
description: Best-effort eager bootstrap of bgutil/PO token provider at daemon startup when primary extractor is ytdlp, without affecting ytx paths or making boot fatal.

title: Verify relay/repeat/provider fixes and update docs
description: Run focused verification for repeat+append, tee-cache replay reuse, and eager provider startup. Update docs/notes for the corrected behavior.

title: Add relay short-read and fallback diagnostics
description: Add contextual relay logging around connection start, retry attempts, short reads, upstream fallback, and premature EOF so failures can be diagnosed from logs without flooding output.

title: Make append reconciliation delta-based and idempotent
description: Fix active-playback queue append reconciliation so it only prepares/appends newly exposed tail entries instead of rebuilding/re-appending existing tracks.

title: Fence current track from background prefix work across replay/new-play flows
description: Ensure current tracks cannot be claimed or continue running as background prefix jobs after stop/clear/new play/replay flows; drop or revalidate stale claimed jobs before prepare.

title: Verify EOF/append/current-track fixes and update docs
description: Run focused verification for relay EOF diagnostics, append reconciliation, and current-track background fencing; update docs/notes as needed.

title: Fix shuffle auto-advance semantics and feedback
description: Make shuffle order respected during automatic advance and add minimal visible feedback so shuffle state and playback behavior stay aligned.

title: Improve autocomplete visibility and trigger rules
description: Show autocomplete suggestions in more reliable search states so users can actually see and use suggestions when typing.

comments.author: assistant
comments.text: Partially addressed in working tree: Navigator-mode search suggestions now reach the autocomplete dropdown again via SearchPaneV2::NavigatorPane::on_query_finished, so suggestions are visible under the active navigator architecture. Remaining scope for trigger-rule tuning and broader visibility polish stays open here; debounce/backpressure is still tracked separately in yrmpc-d1m.

title: Configure ytmapi request dump output from daemon config
description: Allow rmpcd to enable ytmapi request and response dumps from youtube.toml or YTMAPI_DEBUG_DIR for targeted debugging.

title: Implement artist detail wiring on top of navigation contract
description: Use the shared detail navigation contract to make artist pages consistently populate from search and navigation flows.
close_reason: Implemented artist detail wiring on navigator-owned detail panes

comments.author: assistant
comments.text: Artist detail wiring now works through the shared navigator contract. Artist detail data is routed into the navigator-owned artist pane, and manual testing confirmed post-load movement lag was fixed by navigator-owned redraw scheduling for consumed handled keys. Main files: rmpc/src/ui/panes/navigator.rs, rmpc/src/shared/key_event.rs, rmpc/src/ui/panes/navigator_types.rs.

title: Bug: Queue tab album art floating/overlay covering queue list
description:
Queue pane album art (35% split) renders as floating overlay covering the queue list instead of inline layout. Shows wrong image (generic music note fallback instead of playing song art). Bug present since new UI system was implemented. See screenshots in backlog discussion.

Layout should be: 35% album art | 65% queue list (side by side, not overlapping)

title: Add playback interruption and stream-drop diagnostics
description: Add focused observability for stream interruptions, upstream resets, reconnect attempts, and transport fallback reasons so playback failures can be diagnosed without guessing from generic logs.

title: Unify immediate playback deadline policy
description: Resolve the 5s vs 200ms inconsistency between preparation paths and make immediate-play fallback timing explicit, testable, and owned by one policy.

title: Expose richer YouTube artist details in backend
description: Populate subscribers, views, monthly listeners, and thumbnails for related artist and release content in the YouTube backend.
